widgetData.source_sentence: I feel ambivalent about their contributions in group work
sentences: I accept changing expectations without resistance.
I direct my full attention to writing reports.

widgetData.source_sentence: I watch my internal dialogue during tough projects.
sentences: I accept moments of uncertainty as part of the job.
I acknowledge my stress without letting it control me.

widgetData.source_sentence: I concentrate intensely on finalizing reports.

widgetData.source_sentence: I am aware of how office layout impacts my feeling of space.
sentences: I remain conscious of breath during stressful work events.

I return focus when distracted by phone notifications.

widgetData.source_sentence: I focus on one work task at a time.
